base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of intro_castle_silhouette_night — a ui (cutscene) from 1986 castlevania. Opening cutscene — night-sky with crescent moon over silhouette castle. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Opening cutscene — night-sky with crescent moon over silhouette castle; Simon walking toward castle gates with cemetery foreground. Sets the tone before Level 1
